$comment: Maps repo doc paths to Slite note IDs for the GitHub <-> Slite sync. Replace every <placeholder>. 'channel' = the Slite channel the tree lives in; 'root' = the space/folder the tree hangs under; 'folders' = section name -> Slite folder-note id (targets for newly-created docs); 'docs' = repo file path -> Slite note id. The one-time bootstrap can GENERATE this for you (see SYNC.md / the bootstrap runbook).
